articles.title: iPhone users no longer able to downgrade to iOS 26.4
articles.summary: Following last week’s release of iOS 26.4.1, Apple today stopped signing iOS 26.4. Here’s what that means. more…
articles.title_zh: iPhone 用戶不再能降級至 iOS 26.4
articles.summary_zh: 在上週發布 iOS 26.4.1 後，Apple 今日停止簽署 iOS 26.4。

articles.title: Google One discount takes 50% off YouTube Premium for a year
articles.summary: After boosting AI Pro storage earlier this month, Google One is now running a limited-time YouTube Premium discount. more…
articles.title_zh: Google One 折扣提供 50% YouTube Premium 一年優惠
articles.summary_zh: 在本月增加 AI Pro 儲存空間後，Google One 現推出限時 YouTube Premium 折扣。

articles.title: Nothing deleted its AirDrop-esque Warp app just hours after launching it
articles.summary: Earlier today, Nothing announced a new AirDrop-esque app called Warp that sent files between devices through your Google Drive account. Hours later, it has vanished. more…
articles.title_zh: Nothing 在推出 AirDrop 類應用 Warp 數小時後刪除
articles.summary_zh: Nothing 今日推出名為 Warp 的新應用，可透過 Google Drive 在裝置間傳輸檔案，但數小時後該應用已下架。

articles.title: Review: Fender’s Elie 12 is a do-it-all party speaker with party tricks
articles.summary: Even though Fender Audio isn’t steeped in the world of Bluetooth audio, the Elie 12 makes a statement as part of the brand’s entry lineup. It’s a do-it-all speaker that somehow combines minimalist design with maximalist function and sound. more…
articles.title_zh: 評測：Fender Elie 12 是功能全面的派對揚聲器
articles.summary_zh: 儘管 Fender Audio 在藍牙音訊領域經驗有限，Elie 12 卻以極簡設計結合最大化功能和音質，成為品牌入門級產品的亮點。

articles.title: Android phones aren’t at risk of long-standing iPhone tap-to-pay vulnerability [Video]
articles.summary: For the past five years, a tap-to-pay vulnerability on iPhone has been known and has now been highlighted in an in-depth video, but your Android phone is not at risk for this. more…
articles.title_zh: Android 手機不受長期存在的 iPhone 點擊支付漏洞風險影響
articles.summary_zh: 過去五年來 iPhone 上存在已知的點擊支付漏洞，但 Android 手機不受此風險影響。

articles.title: MKBHD pulls back the curtain on LG’s cancelled rollable — LG really thought of everything
articles.summary: TL;DR Before LG shuttered its smartphone division, it had a final trick up its sleeve — the prototype LG Rollable phone. LG’s rollable prototype is out in the open following two YouTube videos showing the device teardown and a hands-on feature overview. It turns out the LG Rollable was more mature of a prototype than we could’ve expected, complete with software tricks, sound effects, and animations. The fall of LG’s smartphone division wasn’t exactly surprising to Android fans, but it certainly was disappointing. LG had a knack for creating risky and innovative Android phones no other brands could rival — one of its final phones was the swivel-screen LG Wing . It’s easy to wonder what could’ve been, and thanks to a couple of tech YouTubers, we don’t have to. Zack Nelson of JerryRigEverythi
articles.title_zh: MKBHD 揭密 LG 取消的可摺疊手機——LG 考慮周密
articles.summary_zh: 在 LG 關閉智慧型手機部門前，推出了最後的原型機 LG Rollable。YouTube 影片展示了該裝置的拆解和功能演示，證明 LG Rollable 已相當成熟。

articles.title: Nothing unveils Warp app for easy transfers between Android and your computer
articles.summary: While Google has already given its two newest flagship smartphone series support for AirDrop, and Samsung is slowly following suit, Nothing is releasing its own system for easily transferring files between Android devices and computers running macOS, Windows, or Linux. It's called Nothing Warp and it's available as a free download for your Android phone from the Play Store. On the computer side, you need to install the Warp extension for Google Chrome and other Chromium-based browsers. You can find this extension in the Chrome Web Store. On your Android device, Warp...
articles.title_zh: Nothing 推出 Warp 應用，輕鬆實現 Android 與電腦間檔案傳輸
articles.summary_zh: Nothing 推出 Warp 應用，為 Android 裝置和執行 macOS、Windows 或 Linux 的電腦提供檔案傳輸解決方案。

articles.title: Xiaomi 18 Pro appears in new renders with a dedicated AI button
articles.summary: The Xiaomi 18 series is not expected to launch for another five months, but rumors about its key specs have been coming in for a while now. The latest additions are a set of renders for the Xiaomi 18 Pro’s back and its all-new AI-button. Based on the image, the 18 Pro will once again feature a triple camera setup and a rear display just like the Xiaomi 17 Pro. Now, these are early renders and may not reflect the final design, but they are consistent with previous reports which suggest the rear screens are here to stay. The more interesting bit is the dedicated AI button, which will...
articles.title_zh: Xiaomi 18 Pro 新渲染圖曝光，配備獨立 AI 按鈕
articles.summary_zh: Xiaomi 18 系列預計五個月後推出，最新渲染圖顯示 Xiaomi 18 Pro 將配備全新的 AI 按鈕。

articles.title_zh: So Close to Getting It

articles.title: A year in, Google wants its Axion processors to feel like a scheduling decision
articles.summary: At KubeCon Europe in Amsterdam, The New Stack sat down with Jago Macleod and Abdel Sghiouar from Google Cloud to talk about what a year of its Arm-based Axion processors in production has meant for Kubernetes users. To sum it up: their argument is that today, the question of whether to try Arm for a given workload has become something that’s easy to answer, because for the majority of containerized workloads, everything is now in place to move them to Arm. “It’s essentially going to boil down to tokens per watt. And I think we will end up selling watts, not CPUs.” — Macleod In this episode, we’ll look at where Google’s custom Arm CPU fits on GKE, why compute classes matter more than the chip itself, and why the real ceiling on all of this is energy
articles.title_zh: 推出一年後，Google 希望 Axion 處理器成為排程決策
articles.summary_zh: Google Cloud 在 KubeCon Europe 分享 Arm 架構 Axion 處理器在生產環境中運行一年的成果，強調對 Kubernetes 用戶的實際意義。

articles.title: ‘Avatar: Aang, The Last Airbender’ Leaked Online. Some Fans Say Paramount Deserves the Fallout
articles.summary: After the full movie leaked, animators mourned the chance to release their work as intended. Others feel the leak is justified in light of Paramount’s marketing blunders and association with Trump.
articles.title_zh: 《Avatar: Aang, The Last Airbender》洩露線上，部分粉絲表示Paramount活該承受後果
articles.summary_zh: 完整電影洩露後，動畫師對無法按計畫發行作品感到遺憾，但也有人認為該洩露是合理的，因為Paramount的市場營銷失誤和與Trump的關聯。

articles.title: India’s Computer Science Grads Are Unprepared for the AI Revolution
articles.summary: Companies like Infosys are running their new hires through many weeks of training to bring them up to speed on new programming tools.
articles.title_zh: 印度計算機科學畢業生對AI革命準備不足
articles.summary_zh: Infosys等公司正對新員工進行多週的培訓，以使其掌握新的編程工具。

articles.title: How Anthropic Learned Mythos Was Too Dangerous for the Wild
articles.summary: The AI company’s own experts warned Mythos could hack the systems beneath most modern computing. Banks and government agencies are racing to gauge the threat.
articles.title_zh: Anthropic如何認定Mythos對於開放環境太危險
articles.summary_zh: 這家AI公司的專家警告Mythos可能駭入大多數現代計算系統的底層，銀行和政府機構正競相評估威脅程度。

articles.title: Nvidia’s Huang Says Mythos Shows Need for US-China AI Dialogue
articles.summary: Nvidia Corp. Chief Executive Officer Jensen Huang said that Anthropic PBC’s Mythos breakthrough shows that the US should seek greater cooperation with China so artificial intelligence researchers in the world’s two largest economies can agree on how to safely use the increasingly powerful technology.
articles.title_zh: Nvidia的Huang表示Mythos表明需要美中AI對話
articles.summary_zh: Nvidia Corp執行長Jensen Huang表示，Anthropic PBC的Mythos突破表明美國應尋求與中國進一步合作，以便全球兩大經濟體的AI研究人員能就安全使用日益強大的技術達成共識。

articles.title: Canada’s Champagne to Discuss Anthropic at Meeting With Bessent
articles.summary: Canada’s finance minister plans to discuss Anthropic PBC’s Mythos model when he meets with US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent this week.
articles.title_zh: 加拿大香檳部長計畫在與Bessent會議中討論Anthropic
articles.summary_zh: 加拿大財政部長計畫在本週與美國財政部長Scott Bessent的會面中討論Anthropic PBC的Mythos模型。

articles.title: S&P Hits Record High as Ceasefire Hopes Fuel Rally | The Close 4/15/2026
articles.summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are BlackRock’s Russ Brownback, JLL CEO Christian Ulbrich, CFRA’s Ken Leon, Elm Wealth Founder Victor Haghani, RBC Capital Markets’ Amy Wu Silverman, Kroll CEO Jake Silverman, Barclays’ William Thompson, Portal Innovations CEO John Flavin, & Wedbush Securities’ Michael Pachter. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.summary_zh: Bloomberg電視台為您帶來華爾街收盤前後的最新新聞和分析，今日嘉賓包括BlackRock的Russ Brownback、JLL執行長Christian Ulbrich、CFRA的Ken Leon、Elm Wealth創辦人Victor Haghani、RBC Capital Markets等。

articles.title: Florida surgeon charged with killing man after removing liver instead of spleen
articles.summary: A Florida grand jury has indicted surgeon Thomas Shaknovsky on charges of second-degree manslaughter for the 2024 death of a patient whose surgical procedure was horrifyingly botched. That patient was 70-year-old William Bryan of Alabama, who was scheduled in August to have his spleen removed in a minimally invasive (laparoscopic) procedure. But instead, Shaknovsky opened Bryan's abdominal cavity, severed his largest vein with a surgical stapling device—which led to his death—and cut his healthy liver from his body as he bled out, according to an investigation by the state health department . Bryan's spleen was left untouched. The second-degree manslaughter charge stems from an investigation by the Walton County Sheriff’s Office, which coordinated with the Office of the State Attorney Firs
articles.title_zh: 佛羅里達外科醫生因誤切肝臟而非脾臟致人死亡被起訴
articles.summary_zh: 佛羅里達州大陪審團控告外科醫生Thomas Shaknovsky犯有二級過失殺人罪，涉及2024年一名患者因手術嚴重失誤而死亡，該患者是來自阿拉巴馬州70歲的William Bryan。

articles.title: Jury finds Live Nation/Ticketmaster is illegal monopoly that overcharged fans
articles.summary: A federal jury ruled today that Live Nation and its Ticketmaster subsidiary operate an illegal monopoly that overcharged fans for tickets, handing a win to US states that continued a trial even after the Trump administration dropped out. The jury found that "Ticketmaster unlawfully maintains a monopoly in the market for ticketing services at major concert venues" and that "Live Nation has a monopoly in the market for large amphitheaters used by artists," said an announcement from the office of New York Attorney General Letitia James. The jury additionally determined "that Live Nation unlawfully requires artists who use the amphitheaters it owns to also use its event promotion services," and "that fans have been overcharged for concert tickets at major concert venues across the country," th
articles.title_zh: 陪審團裁定Live Nation/Ticketmaster構成非法壟斷且過度收費粉絲
articles.summary_zh: 聯邦陪審團今日裁定Live Nation及其子公司Ticketmaster運營非法壟斷，向粉絲過度收費，這是美國各州在Trump政府退出後繼續訴訟的勝利，陪審團認定「Ticketmaster非法維持壟斷」。
